text: `iconUrl` is present in the API response. The issue is the cast `as unknown as RelayChain[]` — the SDK's `RelayChain` type from `useRelayChains` has `iconUrl?: string | null` but our local `RelayChain` interface has `iconUrl?: string`. The `null` value from the API is being treated as falsy correctly... but wait — the SDK's `RelayChain` type from `relay-kit-hooks` is different from our local one. Let me check what the hook actually returns:
